description_long: This is a maroon and white athletic shoe with a low-cut profile, designed for sports or casual urban wear. The upper is constructed from a breathable mesh material, reinforced with synthetic overlays for added structure and durability. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces and eyelets integrated into the side panels for a secure fit. The midsole is white and appears to be made of lightweight foam, providing cushioning and support, while the outsole is made of rubber with a visible tread pattern for traction. The lateral side displays the Adidas logo in white, and the heel and toe areas are reinforced for extra protection. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for active use in urban environments.
description: A maroon and white Adidas athletic shoe with mesh and synthetic overlays, featuring a criss-cross lacing system and a grippy rubber sole. The design is modern, supportive, and built for urban activity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon mesh upper, synthetic overlays, and the white midsole with visible lacing structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the toe box, criss-cross lacing, and the mesh texture of the upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the Adidas logo on the heel and the full profile of the shoe's structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the reinforced heel area and the curvature of the collar.
attribute_logo: White Adidas logo on the lateral heel side, consisting of three stripes and the word 'adidas'.
